allow: PowerShell(cd c:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\nativetalk-redesign; Get-ChildItem node_modules\\.bin\\ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'playwright|puppeteer|chrome' } | Select-Object Name; "---PORTS---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 3000,3001,3002 } | Select-Object LocalPort)
